name: risk-assessment-saas
description: Enterprise-grade risk management platform that replaces Excel with intelligent, automated risk assessment.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix landing
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env && cp landing/.env.example landing/.env
scripts.db:setup: psql -d risk_assessment_db -f backend/src/database/schema.sql && cd backend && npm run seed
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix landing"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix landing"
